caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt with "CHECK IT MAN" printed on the front and a black baseball cap sits in a studio setting. He is wearing large over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of white banners featuring gold stars and the word "HUSTLE," alongside a red and black "BOSS" logo. On-screen graphics include "THE STUDIO PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS PAGE 101" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man adjusts his headphones. He begins by holding both earcups with his hands, then transitions to adjusting the left side while moving his right hand away from his head. He wears a gold watch and a gold bracelet on his wrists. The scene remains static in terms of lighting and location, focusing entirely on the man's slight movements as he settles into his equipment.
